raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.0,"R1.2":0.3,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.6":"The delegation asks only to look at a paragraph, which most directly implies sentence- and paragraph-level readability, flow, and polish rather than higher-level research evaluation.","RX.1":"Any projection should preserve uncertainty because the terse delegation does not specify a concrete review objective.","RX.2":"The paragraph contains empirical and causal-sounding claims, so responsibility includes avoiding projection of stronger duties than requested.","RX.3":"The agent must stay within responsibility projection and not actually review or edit the paragraph.","RX.4":"The projection should avoid enabling misleading downstream treatment of a vague request as a full methodological audit.","RX.5":"The projection must remain traceable to the wording of the delegation and the paragraph-level artifact."}}

rationale.R1.6: The delegation asks only to look at a paragraph, which most directly implies sentence- and paragraph-level readability, flow, and polish rather than higher-level research evaluation.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection should preserve uncertainty because the terse delegation does not specify a concrete review objective.
rationale.RX.2: The paragraph contains empirical and causal-sounding claims, so responsibility includes avoiding projection of stronger duties than requested.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must stay within responsibility projection and not actually review or edit the paragraph.
rationale.RX.4: The projection should avoid enabling misleading downstream treatment of a vague request as a full methodological audit.
rationale.RX.5: The projection must remain traceable to the wording of the delegation and the paragraph-level artifact.
